title: hedeoma patrina
intro: Hedeoma patrina, also known as prairie pennyroyal, is a perennial herb that belongs to the mint family (Lamiaceae). It is native to the prairies and dry woods of North America, and has been used for its medicinal properties, which include its antiseptic and antispasmodic qualities. The plant's health benefits include its ability to relieve digestive issues, reduce anxiety and stress, and even help with menstrual cramps and other feminine health issues. Hedeoma patrina can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, making it a versatile addition to herbal remedies.
